div.head: 25. Editorial Note
div.p:
On March 28, Frank Graham submitted his report on the Kashmir dispute to the U.N. Security Council. The U.S. Mission briefly summarized the report in telegram 1086 from New York, March 28:
“Report follows pattern previously indicated to us by Graham. He states his hope two govts will keep under consideration his proposal for high-level conference and will find it possible promptly themselves make preparations for holding such conference which would include on agenda basic differences they find stand in way of settlement and such other matters they find would contribute to progress toward implementation UNCIP resolutions and toward peaceful settlement.” (Department of State, Central Files, 690D.91/3–2858)
For text of Graham’s report, see U.N. doc. S/3984.
